name: Apollo Global Management, Inc.
description: Apollo Global Management, Inc. is a high-growth, global alternative asset manager. The firm seeks to provide its clients excess return at every point along the risk-reward spectrum from investment grade to private equity, with a focus on three business strategies: yield, hybrid, and equity. Apollo's investment activity is integrated across its asset management and retirement services businesses, which includes Athene, a leading retirement services company. Through its investment expertise and diverse capital bases, Apollo supports businesses with innovative capital solutions for growth and retirement security.
